introSection: Adventure Express is an Arrow Dynamics hybrid roller coaster located at Kings Island in Mason, Ohio, USA. The ride's theming was provided by R&R Creative Amusement Designs, with the animated figures in the ride's finale provided by Sally Corporation.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Adventure Express opened on April 13, 1991 as part of the Wild Animal Habitat section of the park, despite the entrance to the ride being located inside of Oktoberfest. The ride later became part of Oktoberfest in 1999 when Adventure Village was transformed into Action Zone.

For the 2023 season, the ride had additional theming elements added and its queue line was relocated to become part of the Adventure Port themed area.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The third train was removed in 2009 and is now rotated with the other two each season.

fullText:
Adventure Express is an Arrow Dynamics hybrid roller coaster located at Kings Island in Mason, Ohio, USA. The ride's theming was provided by R&R Creative Amusement Designs, with the animated figures in the ride's finale provided by Sally Corporation.

Adventure Express opened on April 13, 1991 as part of the Wild Animal Habitat section of the park, despite the entrance to the ride being located inside of Oktoberfest. The ride later became part of Oktoberfest in 1999 when Adventure Village was transformed into Action Zone.

For the 2023 season, the ride had additional theming elements added and its queue line was relocated to become part of the Adventure Port themed area.



Grey track and unpainted supports.

The third train was removed in 2009 and is now rotated with the other two each season.
